NODE_ENV=production is required in live mode
HYBA_ENV=production is required in live mode
HYBA_ENABLE_LIVE_STRATUM=true is required in live mode

next_operator_actions: Fix the first CRITICAL failure in the readiness packet; advisory warnings can wait.
Rerun the same readiness doctor command from a clean terminal after the fix.
Do not enable live share submission while any CRITICAL failure remains.
